message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "TaskExecutionStrategy" as TES #YellowGreen
participant "Action" as Action #YellowGreen
participant "Connection" as Connection
entity "SSH client/server connection" as SSH
entity "ssh daemon (or winrm service)" as Daemon

TES -> Action : init(..)
TES -> Action : init(..)
TES -> Action : run()
Action -> Connection : put_file()
Connection -> SSH : transfer module data
SSH -> Daemon : 
Daemon -> Daemon : save module to disk
Daemon --> SSH
SSH --> Connection : transfer complete
Connection --> Action : return remote path
Action -> Connection : exec_command()
Connection -> SSH : run module remotely
SSH -> Daemon : 
Daemon -> Daemon : execute shell command
Daemon --> SSH
SSH --> Connection : return response code, stdout, stderr
Connection --> Action : return response code, stdout, stderr
Action --> TES : return JSON

@enduml
```
